channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pete Hegseth says US and Israel will have ‘complete control’ of Iran’s skies in under a week – US politics live
item.description: US defense secretary and Dan Caine, the chairman of the joint chiefs, hold briefing on day five of US-Israeli war on Iran Sign up for the Breaking New...

item.title: Partner of sitting Labour MP among three arrested on suspicion of spying for China
item.description: Exclusive: Trio arrested by counter-terrorism police understood to also include partner of a former Labour MP The partner of a sitting Labour MP is am...

item.title: Israel flagged Hezbollah threat before launching air attacks, leaked memo shows
item.description: US embassy cable said Israeli officials did not trust Lebanon or Syria to contain the group’s fighters Middle East crisis – live updates An internal U...

item.title: Special relationship is not ‘hanging on to Trump’s words’, says Starmer – UK politics live
item.description: PM says the US use of British bases and UK jets shooting down drones shows the links between the two nations Starmer begins PMQs by telling the Common...

item.title: Middle East crisis live: US submarine sank Iranian warship, Hegseth confirms; Israel launches ‘wave of strikes’ on Tehran
item.description: Nearly 150 reported missing and 32 people from the 180-crew frigate Iris Dena Analysis: Trump administration still not settled on reasons for war Tell...

item.title: Man on trial for rape that saw Andy Malkinson wrongfully jailed
item.description: Paul Quinn denies raping a woman in a case that led to one of the "very worst" miscarriages of justice.

item.title: Partner of Labour MP arrested on suspicion of spying for China, BBC told
item.description: He is one of three unnamed men who the Met Police suspect of assisting Chinese intelligence services in the UK.

item.title: Satellite images show Iranian navy and nuclear sites hit by US-Israeli strikes
item.description: US-Israeli strikes have destroyed at least 11 Iranian naval vessels, images reviewed by BBC Verify show.

item.title: First government flight for UK nationals due to leave Middle East tonight
item.description: Some British nationals are being invited to board the flight from the capital of Oman later on Wednesday.

item.title: UK stock market calms but oil prices rise over fears Iran war may drag on
item.description: European markets are trading a little higher but gas and crude prices remain volatile.
